summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lecturer Availability feature (Dostupnost lektora). All 25 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with weekly calendar, recurring availability CRUD, time-off CRUD, lecturer selector, and week navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes properly implement all CRUD operations for recurring availability and time-off
Week-view endpoint correctly returns combined recurring + time-off data for calendar display
Availability check endpoint properly validates: 1) recurring availability exists, 2) no overlapping blockages
Frontend calendar correctly shows green (available), red (blocked), gray (unavailable) cells
Lecturer selector properly filters team members by eligible roles ['edukator', 'lektor', 'admin', 'spravce']
All UI text in Czech as required (Dostupnost lektora, Pravidelná dostupnost, Blokace/výjimky, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (5 recurring blocks Mon-Fri 08:00-12:00, 1 time-off 2026-03-27 09:00-11:00)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lecturer Availability feature fully tested. Backend: 25 tests covering recurring CRUD, time-off CRUD, week-view, availability check, lecturer selector, and error handling. Frontend: /admin/availability page works correctly with weekly calendar (Po-Ne, 7-18h), color coding (green=available, red=blocked, gray=unavailable), add/edit/delete dialogs for recurring and time-off blocks, lecturer selector dropdown for admins, week navigation. All Czech language UI verified.

backend_api.GET /api/lecturer-availability/recurring: PASS - Returns list of recurring availability blocks
backend_api.POST /api/lecturer-availability/recurrin: PASS - Creates blocks for single or multiple days
backend_api.DELETE /api/lecturer-availability/recurr: PASS - Deletes block, returns 404 for nonexistent
backend_api.GET /api/lecturer-availability/time-off: PASS - Returns list of time-off blocks
backend_api.POST /api/lecturer-availability/time-off: PASS - Creates time-off with/without specific times
backend_api.DELETE /api/lecturer-availability/time-o: PASS - Deletes block, returns 404 for nonexistent
backend_api.GET /api/lecturer-availability/week-view: PASS - Returns recurring + time_offs for week

frontend_ui.Navigation: PASS - 'Dostupnost' tab visible in sidebar with Clock icon
frontend_ui.Calendar colors: PASS - Green (19 cells), Red (3 cells), Gray (66 cells) displayed correctly
frontend_ui.Add recurring dialog: PASS - Day checkboxes (Po-Ne), time inputs, save button work
frontend_ui.Add time-off dialog: PASS - Date inputs, optional time inputs, reason field work
frontend_ui.Edit/Delete recurring: PASS - Edit and trash icons functional
frontend_ui.Edit/Delete time-off: PASS - Edit and trash icons functional
frontend_ui.Lecturer selector: PASS - Dropdown shows 5 team members with roles
frontend_ui.Week navigation: PASS - Prev/Next buttons change week display

availability_check_logic.Blockage overlaps: PASS - Returns available=false with blockage reason

verified_features.feature: GET /api/lecturer-availability/week-view returns recurring blocks and time-offs
POST /api/lecturer-availability/recurring creates recurring availability for multiple days
GET /api/lecturer-availability/check returns available=true when in recurring block and no blockage
GET /api/lecturer-availability/check returns available=false when blockage overlaps
GET /api/lecturer-availability/check returns available=false when no recurring availability set
Frontend: /admin/availability page loads with weekly calendar
Frontend: Calendar shows green for available, red for blocked, gray for unavailable
Frontend: Add recurring dialog with day checkboxes and time inputs
Frontend: Add time-off dialog with date, time, and reason fields
Frontend: Edit and delete recurring/time-off blocks work
Frontend: Lecturer selector dropdown for admins
Frontend: Navigation shows 'Dostupnost' tab in sidebar
